skills.name: Pull Rete
skills.description: Throw the rete at nearby enemies to pull them towards you and becomes unable to move for a certain time. Damage increases by #{CaptionRatio3}#% when the caster attacks the target with Retiarius skill.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: 5 seconds
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Throw Rete
skills.description: Throw the rete within a designated range to immobilize the enemies trapped by it. Damage increases by #{CaptionRatio3}#% when the caster attacks the target with Retiarius skill.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: CaptionTime second(s)
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Dagger Guard
skills.description: Grants the ability to block by dagger without a shield. Block applies additionally when receiving damage.
skills.effect_text:
Additional block against incoming damage: + CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Trident Finish
skills.description: Pierce enemies all around and deal damage with your spear. Cannot evade when the target is under Rete debuff, Iron Hook, or Arrest.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Disarm
skills.description: Attack enemies all around with the rete to temporarily decrease the target's Physical, Magic Defense. When the target is a character, removes the equipped shield in the first slot and become momentarily unable to equip a shield.
skills.effect_text:
Physical, Magic Defense -15%
Targets: CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds

skills.name: Dagger Finish
skills.description: Leap forward and stab the enemy with your dagger and apply [Slow] debuff to target for 2.5 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Blandir Cadena
skills.description: Pierce twice, then brandish your spear to deal consecutive damage. Cannot evade when the target is under Rete debuff, Iron Hook, or Arrest.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 10
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Dagger Guard: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Dagger Guard]'s block increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Dagger Guard: Deflect Projectiles
attributes.description:
* The Block effect of [Dagger Guard] that activates when equipping dagger without the shield is removed. Additional evasion is applied. (only 60% of the effect is applied and the efficiency varies according to the number of daggers equipped)

ex) Additional 150% block -> Additional 90% evasion

attributes.name: Trident Finish: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Trident Finish] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Disarm: Remove Helmet
attributes.description:
* Applies the effects of [Disarm] to helmets as well

* Affected helmets: Cassis Crista

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Dagger Finish: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dagger Finish] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Blandir Cadena: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Blandir Cadena] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Blandir Cadena: Fatal Wound
attributes.description:
* Deals additional damage and reduces the movement speed of targets attacked with [Blandir Cadena] in proportion to the number of hits received for 15 sec

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Rete: Daze
attributes.description:
* Inflicts Silence for 3 sec on enemies affected by [Pull Rete]

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Rete: Daze
attributes.description:
* Inflicts Silence for 3 sec on enemies affected by [Pull Rete]

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Throw Rete: Pull Down
attributes.description:
* Flying monsters affected by [Throw Rete] fall to the ground and take damage.

* Airborne characters are returned to the ground

* Damage taken: 100%

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Pull Rete: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Pull Rete]'s one-handed spear damage increasing effect by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Throw Rete: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Pull Rete]'s one-handed spear damage increasing effect by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Dagger Guard: Vital Protection
attributes.description:
* Grants 0.25% chance to grant immunity per attribute level against all removable debuffs while [Dagger Guard] buff is active

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: [Arts] Disarm: Weapon
attributes.description: * [Disarm] skill disarms enemy's main slot weapon instead of enemy's shield.

attributes.name: [Arts] Trident Finish: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Trident Finish] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Dagger Finish: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Dagger Finish] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Blandir Cadena: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Blandir Cadena] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Throw Rete: Large Rete
attributes.description:
* Doubles the range of Rete and target number

* Deleted the Pierce-type damage

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Retiarius: Determination
attributes.description:
* Apply [Determination] buff to the character when there are enemies within the nearby 100 area

* [Determination] can be stacked until 10 stacks, 2 stacks per second

* 1 [Determination] stack decreases per second when there isn't any enemies nearby

* Final damage of Retiarius skill increases by 1% per 1 [Determination] stack
